```{=html}
<!-- replace_values() - replacing Northwest with Northern Palmer Archipelago -->
<script>
window.REPVAL_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750', 'Southwest'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800', 'Northwest'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4750', 'Northwest'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000', 'Southwest']
];
window.REPVAL_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g', 'island_location'];
// Which rows have "Northwest" to replace
window.REPVAL_MATCHES = [false, true, true, false];
window.REPVAL_HIGHLIGHT_COLOR = '#4a86c5';
</script>
```

::: {.repval-stage-wrap}
<div id="repval-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .repval-frag id="repval-highlight"}
[]{.fragment .repval-frag id="repval-result"}
[]{.fragment .repval-frag id="repval-highlight-new"}
